Name: French International School Hong Kong
Tagline: World-class multilingual International School (French / English) with IB (IBDP), IGCSE & French curriculum. Hong Kong's First IB Program
About: Learn more about the International StreamLearn more about the French Stream You want your child to have the best possible education. Let us show you why we are the school of choice for hundreds of international families in Hong Kong.
Philosophy: The French International School Hong Kong emphasizes a bilingual and multicultural education, fostering global citizenship. It integrates the French and International Baccalaureate curricula, preparing students for diverse academic and career pathways in Hong Kong and beyond.
Outcomes: Our university guidance department is made up of five guidance counsellors, each with a specific geographic area of expertise, and one administrative and communications assistant. The university guidance department aims to ensure students are fully aware of the demands of higher education, and corresponding career prospects, and to enable each student to develop and implement their own personalised plan.
Admissions: It is possible to apply for the French stream if no one in your family speaks French, however it does depend on your family’s plans and the child’s age. Some guidance is below, but please get in touch with the admissions team so they can understand your motivations and determine how practical it is.
Quote: Empowering global citizens through a fusion of French and international education, inspiring excellence and embracing diversity.

Performance.Facilities & Resources: Why not attend one of our regular campus tours and see our school in action?
Performance.Coaching Credentials: ECAs are created just for FIS students and are supervised by qualified professionals. Available from kindergarten all the way through to Terminale, these activities take place outside of teaching time, throughout the school year.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: There is a wide range of activities to choose from, from sports and arts, through to the cultural and educational. We regularly monitor our extracurricular activities, reviewing them each year to ensure they are of consistently high quality.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The French International School Hong Kong offers a robust pastoral care system with dedicated counsellors and wellness programmes, fostering a supportive community environment for students' mental and emotional health.
Performance.Academic Integration: The school integrates the French curriculum with the International Baccalaureate (IB) programme, offering a bilingual education that includes IGCSEs, preparing students for both local and international academic pathways.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates from the French International School Hong Kong achieve high acceptance rates at top universities globally, with many excelling in IB exams, showcasing strong academic performance and diverse career readiness.
